#### Human Readable Output
### aws-sns-list-subscriptions-by-topic
***
Returns a list of the subscriptions to a specific topic. Each call returns a limited list of subscriptions, up to 100.
#### Base Command
`aws-sns-list-subscriptions-by-topic`
